nasb.text: Now Herod the tetrarch heard of all that was happening; and he was greatly perplexed, because it was said by some that John had risen from the dead,

esv.text: Now Herod the tetrarch heard about all that was happening, and he was perplexed, because it was said by some that John had been raised from the dead,

cnv.text: 分封王希律聽見所發生的一切事，猶豫不定，因為有人說：“約翰從死人中復活了。”

ccb.text: 耶稣的事迹很快便传到希律耳中，令他十分困惑，因为有人说：“约翰死而复活了”，

csbs.text: 分封王希律听说了所发生的这一切，就感到困惑，因为有些人说：“约翰从死人中复活了。”
